name: Creator Skills Mapping
title: Creator Skills Mapping
description: Defines the exact output artifacts for the factory's specialized creator skills, along with their active consumers.

artifact_generation.description: Generating a factory artifact using a creator skill.

best_practices: Always validate the generated artifacts against their JSON schemas.
Ensure specific consumers are updated when creator skills produce new output types.
anti_patterns: Generating factory artifacts manually without using the dedicated creator skills.
Ignoring schema validation errors during creation.

content.rule: Specialized creator skills MUST be used for generating new canonical artifacts to enforce schema validation.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Patterns are verified through automated testing.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: The user maintains control over all generated output.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: All automated actions are logged and verifiable.
axiomAlignment.A4_non_harm: Strict safety checks prevent destructive operations.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Uniform patterns ensure predictable system behavior.
